assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing Security Configuration section with Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories unchanged
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 42-63 contain '## Security Configuration' with '### Product Lifecycle' (Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle, Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT, Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200, Component label pattern: pscomponent:, VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345), '### Version Streams' (2.1.x row with git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z, /home/user/product-release.2.1.z, security-matrix.md), and '### Source Repositories' (backend: https://github.com/example/backend, frontend-ui: https://github.com/example/frontend-ui) — all matching expected values exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md reports that Security Configuration is already fully configured or up to date
assertion_results.evidence:
discovery-log.md lines 43-51: '## Security Configuration
Status: UP TO DATE

The Security Configuration section already exists and is fully populated with all sub-sections:
- Product Lifecycle: all 5 fields present and populated
- Version Streams: 2.1.x stream row present
- Source Repositories: both `backend` and `frontend-ui` rows present

Section is already fully configured — skipping opt-in prompt. No changes needed.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was preserved with no changes needed
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 13: '- **Security Configuration** — preserved as-is (Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories all unchanged)'. Also lines 4-5: 'All sections of the Project Configuration were already fully populated. The setup skill performed a full idempotency check and found nothing to update.' And lines 15-17: '## New Entries Added\n\nNone. No new entries were added to any section.'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 50-51: 'Section is already fully configured — skipping opt-in prompt. No changes needed.' There is no mention anywhere of an opt-in being offered or declined — the log explicitly states the opt-in was skipped due to the section already being fully populated.

assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 5-8: '| backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/backend |' and '| frontend-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/frontend-ui |' — both rows match expected values exactly.
